reviews.text: Kari truly lives up to her reputation. Not only is she one of the most incredible Wedding photographers, she's also such a beautiful and kind soul. I had a lot of questions during our wedding planning process, and she was so helpful with answering all my questions in a timely manner, but also making life easier for me as the bride. When she showed up for our wedding day, she brought the energy, professionalism, and passion to make our day as successful as it was. We had an outdoor ceremony and were blasted with dust storms. You would never guess by how amazing the photos are. She truly is an artist capturing the emotion in every photo.  I had a dream image in my head, and she made that image come to life. I really cannot say enough about how truly grateful we are for Kari, and what an incredible photographer she is.  Our guests couldn’t stop mentioning how discreet Kari was. She moved with such quiet grace that we hardly noticed her, yet somehow she captured every beautiful, fleeting moment. We have such beautiful memories captured in time to forever look back on. She's truly the best!!! So grateful!!

Kari is the kindest, most talented photographer of all time. She is so easy to talk to and goes out of her way to ensure that our vision is happening. I’ve thoroughly enjoyed every step starting with the initial calls, engagement shoot, and ending with the most beautiful and smooth wedding I could have ever imagined. She even helped me with some non photography wedding planning and I cannot thank her enough. I would hire 100 times over again.  Out of the dozens of vendors we worked with, she was always responsive, friendly, helpful, and highly skilled.

Where do I even start, Kari was such a delight to work with!! We hired her for our June 8, 2024 wedding at blanc in Denver. My husband and I had never been in front of a professional photographer and she made us feel so comfortable. She had a great energy, worked well with our families, and was fun and creative with her shots. I’ve only seen the photo preview so far but I’m OBSESSED. She has a special eye and captured all the little details that were so important to me during planning! I loved everything about working with her and would hire her over and over again for any photography needs.

I cannot say enough wonderful things about Kari! We booked her for our engagement and wedding photos and we couldn’t be happier. My fiance and I are not particularly camera people lol but she made us feel so comfortable, light, and happy with the photoshoot process. We really wanted to enjoy as much of our wedding as we could without being carried away for photos for a long time. But because she is so easy to work with we breezed through all our photos with each other and family ! Her work is amazing and she takes much pride in it, not to mention she’s so easy going and hilarious! Def book her for any photo needs

Kari is absolutely fantastic! My fiancé and I found Kari on the knot, and loved her work so much that we traveled to Colorado from Arizona in March 2016 for our engagement pictures! Kari is so full of life, and you can see her passion for her work through her photos. In addition to her obvious talent, she is open-minded and a BLAST to work with. We then flew her out to Arizona to work our wedding December 9th, 2016. Again, nothing short of AMAZING! I am simply in awe of the photos from the wedding! Kari captured EVERY moment of our big day perfectly. Thank you Kari!
